name: Moving Border
summary: A button component with an animated border that continuously moves around the edge using SVG path animation.
detailedDescription: Moving Border creates a button with an animated glowing border that travels continuously around the button edge. The component uses an SVG path with rounded corners (rx/ry configurable, default 30%) as the border track. Framer Motion's useAnimationFrame updates a progress motion value from 0 to path length, creating continuous motion. The progress drives x/y transforms via getPointAtLength(), positioning a gradient blob (default cyan radial gradient) along the path. The blob has 0.8 opacity with configurable bg-[radial-gradient(#0ea5e9_40%,transparent_60%)]. Button dimensions are fixed (h-16 w-40) with transparent background and configurable border radius (default 1.75rem). Inner content sits in a relative div with slate-900 background (80% opacity), border, backdrop-blur-xl, and white text. The moving border div is absolute inset-0 with slightly smaller radius (0.96x) for proper fit. Duration defaults to 3000ms for smooth continuous motion. This creates an eye-catching CTA button ideal for primary actions, signup buttons, or any context where an animated border draws attention without overwhelming the design.
purpose: Continuously move gradient along button edge
Enhance CTAs with subtle motion accent
behavior: Animates progress along SVG path continuously
Positions gradient blob at progress point
Loops animation infinitely via modulo operator
recommendations: Use where moderate motion and reusable composition improve UX and clarity.
